summary: Iteration 61 - CelebrationOverlay in PlayerView.jsx Bug Fix VERIFIED. All reported bugs FIXED: 1) AI Commentary auto-refreshing with 12 key moments covering overs 1.3 to 17.4, 2) Celebration animations (SIX/FOUR/WICKET/WINNER) all appearing correctly in PlayerView.jsx, 3) CelebrationOverlay renders with z-[200] fixed position, 4) Live Update Indicator shows 'Updated Xs ago' and 'Poll #N', 5) Force Refresh button working.
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: PlayerView.jsx now includes CelebrationOverlay component at root level with z-[200]
FIX VERIFIED: PlayerView.jsx has onCelebrate prop passed to MatchDetailPage
FIX VERIFIED: PlayerView.jsx has global scorecard polling (30s interval) for auto-celebration detection
FIX VERIFIED: MatchDetailPage.jsx demo buttons (SIX/FOUR/WICKET/WINNER) call onCelebrate correctly
FIX VERIFIED: AI Commentary cache TTL is 40s for live matches (not infinite)
FIX VERIFIED: Live Update Indicator shows 'Updated Xs ago | Poll #N | Refresh' button
seed_data_creation: None - used existing live match 9c53d4ca-10c2-4e18-a723-77d4bd205640 (PBKS vs GT)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 61 verified all CelebrationOverlay bug fixes in PlayerView.jsx. Key findings: 1) Admin login → Player View → Match Detail shows demo buttons (SIX/FOUR/WICKET/WINNER), 2) Clicking demo buttons triggers CelebrationOverlay with correct animations and particle effects, 3) CelebrationOverlay has data-testid='celebration-{type}' for testing, 4) Live tab shows AI Commentary with 12 key moments covering overs 1.3 to 17.4, 5) Live Update Indicator shows 'Updated 5s ago | Poll #2 | Refresh', 6) Back to Admin button confirms we're in PlayerView.jsx (not PlayerApp). Live match ID: 9c53d4ca-10c2-4e18-a723-77d4bd205640 (PBKS vs GT, score 142/6 in 20 overs).

player_view_switch.button_click: PASSED - Player View button in admin dashboard
player_view_switch.player_mode: PASSED - Shows player home with live match card

match_detail_page.demo_buttons: PASSED - SIX/FOUR/WICKET/WINNER buttons visible with data-testid
match_detail_page.celebration_overlay: PASSED - All 4 celebration types trigger correctly

celebration_overlay.six_animation: PASSED - Golden 'MAXIMUM!' overlay with fire particles
celebration_overlay.wicket_animation: PASSED - Red 'WICKET!' overlay with stump debris
celebration_overlay.z_index: PASSED - z-[200] fixed position covering entire screen

live_tab.ai_commentary: PASSED - 12 key moments covering overs 1.3 to 17.4
live_tab.match_pulse: PASSED - 'PBKS bowl first; GT stumble under lights'
live_tab.timeline: PASSED - Shows Timeline (12) with event cards
live_tab.sub_tabs: PASSED - Match Story, Phase Analysis, Timeline, MVPs

back_to_admin.button_present: PASSED - Confirms we're in PlayerView.jsx (not PlayerApp)

backend_api_tests.login: PASSED - POST /api/auth/login returns token with is_admin: true
backend_api_tests.matches: PASSED - GET /api/matches?status=live returns PBKS vs GT match
backend_api_tests.scorecard: PASSED - GET /api/matches/{id}/scorecard returns current match data

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Admin users see AdminApp → PlayerView.jsx (not PlayerApp). PlayerView.jsx was missing: 1) CelebrationOverlay component, 2) onCelebrate prop to MatchDetailPage, 3) Global scorecard polling for auto-celebration detection.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added CelebrationOverlay at root of PlayerView.jsx with z-[200], added triggerCelebration callback, passed onCelebrate prop to MatchDetailPage, added global scorecard polling (30s interval) to detect 4s/6s/wickets.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All celebration animations now appear when demo buttons clicked. Live Update Indicator shows poll count. AI Commentary shows fresh data with 12 key moments.
